THEWITCH-HEXBLAST.title: Hexblast
THEWITCH-HEXBLAST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice to ALL enemies.
Apply {HexPower:diff()} [gold]Hex[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEWITCH-CAPTURE_SOUL.title: Capture Soul
THEWITCH-CAPTURE_SOUL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {CalculatedHex:diff()} [gold]Hex[/gold].
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], Permanently increase this card's hex by 1.
THEWITCH-TORMENT.title: Torment
THEWITCH-MOONBEAM.title: Moonbeam
THEWITCH-MOONBEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage at the start of each of your turns.
THEWITCH-PLAGUE.title: Plague
THEWITCH-PLAGUE.description:
Apply {HexPower:diff()} [gold]Hex[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Put ALL [gold]Rats[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-COMMAND.title: Command
THEWITCH-COMMAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
One of your [gold]Familiars[/gold] creates a card.
THEWITCH-TRASH_DIVING.title: Trash Diving
THEWITCH-TRASH_DIVING.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add a [gold]Rats[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-TRASH_DIVING.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold]
THEWITCH-ROT_BLOOM.title: Rot Bloom
THEWITCH-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.title: Cursed Spellbook
THEWITCH-REFUSE_PILE.title: Refuse Pile
THEWITCH-REFUSE_PILE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Cards} [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Rats+|Rats}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
THEWITCH-HASTY_BREW.title: Hasty Brew
THEWITCH-TINDER.title: Tinder
THEWITCH-GRIND_DOWN.title: Grind Down
THEWITCH-SPROUTS.title: Sprouts
THEWITCH-SPROUTS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you play a card this turn, gain {SproutsPower} [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWITCH-DISTILL.title: Distill
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.title: Extract Essence
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
On unblocked damage, create a [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWITCH-STRIKE_WITCH.title: Strike
THEWITCH-DEFEND_WITCH.title: Defend
THEWITCH-OWL_FAMILIAR.title: Owl Familiar
THEWITCH-WISDOM.title: Wisdom
THEWITCH-STONY_BREW.title: Stony Brew
THEWITCH-CAT_FAMILIAR.title: Cat Familiar
THEWITCH-FEROCITY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Attack[/gold] played this turn.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
THEWITCH-FEROCITY.title: Ferocity
THEWITCH-FERTILIZE.title: Fertilize
THEWITCH-LAVENDER_AND_SAGE.title: Lavender and Sage
THEWITCH-READ_THE_BONES.title: Read the Bones
THEWITCH-WICKER_FORM.title: Wicker Form
THEWITCH-WICKER_FORM.description: Whenever you play a card, gain {WickerFormPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWITCH-RIP_SOUL.title: Rip Soul
THEWITCH-CATALYST.title: Catalyst
THEWITCH-CATALYST.description: Whenever you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], duplicate a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-CALL_THE_PACK.title: Call the Pack
THEWITCH-BRAMBLEBURST.title: Brambleburst
THEWITCH-BRAMBLEBURST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]Bramble[/gold], then lose all [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWITCH-WILD_GROWTH.title: Wild Growth
THEWITCH-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.title: Forbidden Magic
THEWITCH-BONFIRE.title: Bonfire
THEWITCH-POLYMORPH.title: Polymorph
THEWITCH-POLYMORPH.description: Transform a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into {Cards:diff()} [gold]Rats[/gold].
THEWITCH-SALT_AND_ASH.title: Salt and Ash
THEWITCH-SALT_AND_ASH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {BonusBlock:diff()} extra [gold]Block[/gold] if you have a debuff.
THEWITCH-RITUAL_CASTING.title: Ritual Casting
THEWITCH-RITUAL_CASTING.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] that costs 2 or more, a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is free to play this turn.
THEWITCH-STRIKE_FEAR.title: Strike Fear
THEWITCH-NEEDLE_WHIP.title: Needle Whip
THEWITCH-TASTE_OF_BLOOD.title: Taste of Blood
THEWITCH-TASTE_OF_BLOOD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Attack played this turn.
THEWITCH-DEEP_ROOTS.title: Deep Roots
THEWITCH-DEEP_ROOTS.description: At the start of your turn, gain {DeepRootsPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWITCH-HIDE_IN_A_BUSH.title: Hide in a Bush
THEWITCH-STUCK_IN_A_BUSH.title: Stuck in a Bush
THEWITCH-WICKED_BREW.title: Wicked Brew
THEWITCH-HERBAL_BREW.title: Herbal Brew
THEWITCH-RATTLING_BOTTLES.title: Rattling Bottles
THEWITCH-RATTLING_BOTTLES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Fill your empty potion slots with [gold]Rocks[/gold].
THEWITCH-BAG_OF_TEETH.title: Bag of Teeth
THEWITCH-HIDDEN_IN_SMOKE.title: Hidden in Smoke
THEWITCH-HIDDEN_IN_SMOKE.description: At the start of your turn, create a [gold]Vial of Smoke[/gold].
THEWITCH-MULCH.title: Mulch
THEWITCH-ROTTING_ROOTS.title: Rotting Roots
THEWITCH-ROTTING_ROOTS.description: At the start of your turn, ALL enemies lose {RottingRootsPower:diff()} HP and gain 1 [gold]Hex[/gold].
THEWITCH-BIND_IN_BLOOD.title: Bind in Blood
THEWITCH-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.title: Bottomless Cauldron
THEWITCH-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.description: Whenever you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], create a [gold]Noxious Brew[/gold].
THEWITCH-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.title: Cloak of Moonlight
THEWITCH-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.description: Whenever you create a card or [gold]Potion[/gold], gain {CloakOfMoonlightPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEWITCH-VOLATILE_VAPORS.title: Volatile Vapors
THEWITCH-VOLATILE_VAPORS.description: Whenever you use or create a [gold]Potion[/gold], deal {VolatileVaporsPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
THEWITCH-BOTTLE_WALL.title: Bottle Wall
THEWITCH-CAULDRON_DANCE.title: Cauldron Dance
THEWITCH-CAULDRON_DANCE.description: Whenever you play a Skill this turn, draw a card.
THEWITCH-RUMMAGE.title: Rummage
THEWITCH-RUMMAGE.description: Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-SWARM.title: Swarm
THEWITCH-NIMBLE.title: Nimble
THEWITCH-KNOWLEDGE.title: Knowledge
THEWITCH-KNOWLEDGE.description: Create {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:copy|copies} of a non-Knowledge card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-WORMY.title: Wormy
THEWITCH-HIBERNATE.title: Hibernate
THEWITCH-MUTILATE.title: Mutilate
THEWITCH-DARK_OMEN.title: Dark Omen
THEWITCH-SHINY.title: Shiny!
THEWITCH-SHINY.description: Put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-SHINY.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold]
THEWITCH-RATS.title: Rats
THEWITCH-RAT_FAMILIAR.title: Rat Familiar
THEWITCH-BEAR_FAMILIAR.title: Bear Familiar
THEWITCH-CROW_FAMILIAR.title: Crow Familiar
THEWITCH-POCKET_RATS.title: Pocket Rats
THEWITCH-BROOM_STRIKE.title: Broom Strike
THEWITCH-BROOM_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Your next [gold]Skill[/gold] costs 1 less.
THEWITCH-EYE_OF_NEWT.title: Eye of Newt
THEWITCH-CRYSTAL_BOTTLE.title: Crystal Bottle
THEWITCH-CRYSTAL_BOTTLE.description: The next [gold]Potion[/gold] you use is used again at the start of each turn.
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_LIFE.title: Extract Life
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_LIFE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Give a card in your hand [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
THEWITCH-EXTRACT_LIFE.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card to gain [gold]Replay[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold]
THEWITCH-PICK_CLEAN.title: Pick Clean
THEWITCH-PICK_CLEAN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw a card for each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold].
THEWITCH-OVERRUN.title: Overrun
THEWITCH-OVERRUN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a [gold]Familiar[/gold] card this turn, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
THEWITCH-RITUAL_SACRIFICE.title: Ritual Sacrifice
THEWITCH-GNASH.title: Gnash
THEWITCH-GNASH.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Increase the damage of ALL Gnash cards by {ExtraDamage:diff()} this combat.
THEWITCH-WOLF_FAMILIAR.title: Wolf Familiar
THEWITCH-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.title: Weathered Witch Hat
THEWITCH-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Play a random Skill from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEWITCH-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.title: Embrace the Wilds
THEWITCH-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.description:
Summon {Familiars:diff()} random [gold]Familiars[/gold].
Draw {DrawReduction} fewer cards at the start of each turn.
THEWITCH-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.title: Circle of Rot
THEWITCH-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.description:
You and your allies gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEWITCH-CREEPING_VINES.title: Creeping Vines
THEWITCH-SHARE_THE_BREW.title: Share the Brew
THEWITCH-SHARE_THE_BREW.description: You and your allies each gain a random [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWITCH-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.title: Bottle Barrage
THEWITCH-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Potion[/gold] created this combat.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
THEWITCH-GATHER_HERBS.title: Gather Herbs
THEWITCH-MESSAGE_IN_A_BOTTLE.title: Message in a Bottle
THEWITCH-MESSAGE_IN_A_BOTTLE.description: Bottle a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into a [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWITCH-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.title: Double, Double
THEWITCH-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Give a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay}.
THEWITCH-AMBUSH.title: Ambush!
THEWITCH-AMBUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Whenever you draw this card, play it for free.
THEWITCH-A_LITTLE_SIP.title: A Little Sip
THEWITCH-A_LITTLE_SIP.description: Whenever you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], heal {ALittleSipPower:diff()} HP and gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_AGONY.title: Pact of Agony
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_AGONY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add {Cards} [gold]{Cards:plural:Wound|Wounds}[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
THEWITCH-PACT_OF_FURY.title: Pact of Fury
THEWITCH-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.title: Light the Candle
THEWITCH-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.description: Create a [gold]Vial of Smoke[/gold].[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-WITCHCRAFT.title: Witchcraft
THEWITCH-WAX_AND_WANE.title: Wax and Wane
THEWITCH-WAX_AND_WANE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, apply {WaxAndWanePower:diff()} [gold]Hex[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEWITCH-VEXING_STRIKE.title: Vexing Strike
THEWITCH-BEWITCHING_GRIN.title: Bewitching Grin
THEWITCH-BROKEN_PACT.title: Broken Pact
THEWITCH-BIG_BATCH.title: Big Batch
THEWITCH-PRICES_PAID.title: Prices Paid
